title: Fake test: add temporary test badge to one team card
problem_summary: Fake test: add temporary test badge to one team card.
goal: Resolve: Fake test: add temporary test badge to one team card, with the smallest safe change that satisfies QA.
acceptance_criteria: The scoped issue is resolved: Fake test: add temporary test badge to one team card
App builds successfully with npm run build
Local app can be opened for verification
Targeted change is visible or behaves correctly on the relevant page/flow
Changes remain tightly limited to the suspected files unless a clearly related helper/config file must also be updated
qa_plan: Start local app with npm run dev
Run Playwright smoke QA if available
Verify the targeted change locally in the browser
system_impact: Low risk. This should avoid unrelated production-facing behavior changes unless strictly necessary. Primary expected scope: src/components/ClientTeams.tsx.
stop_conditions: Task scope expands beyond the targeted fix
implementation_instruction: In src/components/ClientTeams.tsx, add a temporary test badge (e.g. a span with text 'TEST' or similar) to the first team card in the Teams Grid. Inside the map over uniqueTeams, for index === 0, add a small badge element before or wrapping the TeamCard. Edit only this file.
